message:
feat(builder): Unify ID generation and add inline block APIs

- Integrate NameGen into ZigBuilder for unified ID generation across
  NativeCodegen and builder - prevents label conflicts
- Add inline block expression APIs (emitInlineBlockStart/End/Raw) for
  generating labeled blocks as expressions
- Migrate site_mod.zig and glob_mod.zig to use builder inline block APIs
- Change ScopeHandle/ScopeContext IDs from u32 to usize for compatibility
- Add getBuilder() integration to pass shared NameGen to builder

Migration pattern established:
- OLD: emitFmt("(__m{d}_xxx: {{ ... break :__m{d}_xxx result; }})", .{id, id})
- NEW: const label = try b.emitInlineBlockStart("xxx");
       try self.emit("...");
       try self.emitFmt("break :{s} result; ", .{label});
       try b.emitInlineBlockEnd();
